sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113418" key="xarkolo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαρκ-ολόγος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, written for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χαλκολόγος,</foreign> <sense id="n113418.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">money-collector,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">514</biblScope> </bibl> (ibid.).</sense> </entryFree>
